analyze_pdf.description: Goldman Sachs 10-Q (Q1 2025) loaded via PyMuPDF from corpus/pdfs/

highlights: Goldman Sachs reported a significant increase in net earnings to $4,738 million for the quarter ended March 31, 2025, compared to $4,132 million in the same period last year, indicating strong operational performance. (Results)
The company achieved a notable rise in earnings per common share, reaching $14.25, up from $11.67 in the prior year, reflecting effective cost management and revenue generation strategies. (Results)

risks.snippet: Reputational risk is the potential risk that negative publicity regarding our business practices, whether true or not, will cause a decline in our customer base, costly litigation or revenue reductions.

Compliance risk is the risk of legal or regulatory sanctions, material financial loss or damage to our reputation arising from our failure to comply with the requirements of applicable laws, rules and regulations, and our internal policies and procedures.
Conflicts of interest and our approach to dealing with them are fundamental to our client relationships, our reputation and our long-term success.
